qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: Server-Side Request Forgery via workflow import-from-url endpoint
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The advisory describes improper CSP enforcement on webhook responses leading to stored XSS (CWE-79). This finding describes SSRF via the /rest/workflows/from-url endpoint where axios.get() is called without IP blocklisting. The vulnerable endpoint, code path, root cause, and vulnerability class are entirely different from the CSP/XSS issue.

qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: VM2 sandbox escape in Code node enables remote code execution
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The advisory describes improper CSP enforcement on webhook responses leading to stored XSS (CWE-79). This finding describes a vm2 sandbox escape in the Code node execution path via @n8n/vm2. The vulnerable code (JavaScriptSandbox.ts), root cause (vm2 proxy-based sandboxing), and vulnerability class (sandbox escape RCE) are entirely different from the CSP/XSS issue in webhook responses.

target_advisory_judgement.reason: The advisory (GHSA-825q-w924-xhgx) describes improper CSP enforcement in webhook responses leading to stored XSS (CWE-79). Neither qualifying finding identifies this root cause. The findings cover SSRF via the workflow from-url endpoint and vm2 sandbox escape in Code nodes — distinct vulnerability classes and code paths unrelated to CSP header handling on webhook HTML responses.
evidence: Advisory root cause: CSP sandbox protection not applied correctly to webhook responses and related HTTP endpoints.
Advisory patches: commits ced34c0 and e8cf4d6 in n8n-io/n8n.
Finding 'ssrf-workflow-from-url': SSRF via axios.get() without IP blocklist — unrelated endpoint and vulnerability class.
Finding 'vm2-sandbox-escape-rce': vm2 sandbox escape in Code node — unrelated code path and vulnerability class.
